title: CI test runner script
description: scripts/run_tests.sh: runs py_compile on all .py files, validate_task_graph, integration_test, summarizes pass/fail with exit code.
acceptance_criteria: Runs py_compile on all MAP_System/**/*.py files
Prints per-check pass/fail and a final summary
Exits nonzero if any check fails
Exits 0 and all green against current workspace
